data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Remote participant visibility on classroom screen', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of the necessary classroom technology to ensure this visibility. The linked use case mentions remote students being visible on a 55" screen, but without concrete API reads or persisted state checks confirming the setup and operation of this technology, the requirement cannot be deemed satisfied. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a classroom camera/mic setup for remote visibility.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
